name: Huntington Beach
description: Surf City USA. Long sandy stretch, consistent shoulder-high surf, big crowds.

name: Santa Monica State Beach
description: Iconic LA beach with the Ferris wheel pier. Gentle waves, easy parking nightmare.

name: La Jolla Cove
description: Postcard-perfect cove with sea lions, snorkeling, and tide pools.

name: Ocean Beach (San Francisco)
description: Cold, foggy, and dangerous. Locals walk it. Tourists try to swim it. Don't.

name: South Beach (Miami)
description: Warm water, white sand, art deco backdrop. Loud, packed, glorious.

name: Clearwater Beach
description: Sugar-soft sand, Gulf-side calm water, killer sunsets.

name: Daytona Beach
description: Yes, you can drive on it. Yes, that's part of the appeal.

name: Waikiki Beach
description: Beginner surf paradise with Diamond Head views and zero parking.

name: Banzai Pipeline (Ehukai Beach)
description: World-famous heaving barrels over a shallow reef. Watch from the sand.

name: Kill Devil Hills (Outer Banks)
description: Long, wild Atlantic stretch on the Outer Banks. Wind, waves, history.

name: Myrtle Beach
description: Mini-golf, boardwalk, 60 miles of beach. A proper American beach town.

name: Jones Beach
description: Long Island's grand Atlantic beach. Robert Moses' love letter to the masses.

name: Asbury Park Beach
description: The Boss's beach. Boardwalk, music, and unironic Jersey Shore energy.

name: Cannon Beach
description: Haystack Rock, dramatic fog, water cold enough to make you reconsider life.

name: Long Beach
description: 28 miles of drivable Pacific beach. Razor clams, kite festivals, gray skies.

name: South Padre Island
description: Gulf warmth, spring-break legend, surprisingly great shelling north of town.
